do local return(function(G,F,H,R,T,M,o,f,e,E,t,v,S,p,k,K,x,A,d,j,L,Q)v,k,f,d,p,K,x,j,Q,e,A,L,E,S,t=function(G)d[G]=d[G]-(307787+-307786)if d[G]==928875-928875 then d[G],L[G]=nil,nil end end,function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(...)return e(G,{...},J,F)end return H end,function(G)for J=180894+-180893,#G,33789-33788 do d[G[J]]=d[G[J]]+(660590-660589)end if H then local e=H(true)local F=T(e)F[J(279376+-296911)],F[J(-841400+823892)],F[J(934817+-952285)]=G,j,function()return 657969+379866 end return e else return R({},{[J(526545-544053)]=j;[J(350278-367813)]=G;[J(671570-689038)]=function()return 1896785-858950 end})end end,{},function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(H,R)return e(G,{H;R},J,F)end return H end,function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(H,R,T,M,o)return e(G,{H;R;T;M;o},J,F)end return H end,function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(H,R,T)return e(G,{H,R;T},J,F)end return H end,function(G)local J,e=443556+-443555,G[-857987+857988]while e do d[e],J=d[e]-(637641+-637640),(342002+-342001)+J if-409787-(-409787)==d[e]then d[e],L[e]=nil,nil end e=G[J]end e<301102+14735528 then L[t]=i e=L[t]e=e and-201683+10389239 or-248526+12049530 else e=-919737+10303444 N=J(486917-504524)y=G[N]N=J(37218-54817)W=P i=y[N]y=i(d,W)i=L[R[651436+-651430]]N=i()g=y+N W=nil F=f(J)local H=function()return e(G,{},J,F)end return H end,{},function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(H,R,T,M)return e(G,{H;R,T,M},J,F)end return H end,function(G,J)local F=f(J)local H=function(H)return e(G,{H},J,F)end return H end,75202-75202 return(k(981622+-656846,{}))(F(o))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[J(-824306-(-806734))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
